SELECT

from sonicmoe import MoE, enable_fp8, enable_native_fp8, enable_quack_gemm
from sonicmoe.enums import ActivationType

T, H, I, E, K = 8192, 3072, 1536, 8, 8

for mode_name, run_fn in [
    \(\\"FP8 Frontier\\", lambda moe, x, dout: \(
        moe.zero_grad\(set_to_none=True\),
        x.__setattr__\(\\"grad\\", None\),

def bench\(label, run_fn\):
    for _ in range\(WARMUP\):
        run_fn\(\)
    torch.cuda.synchronize\(\)
    times = []
    for _ in range\(5\):
        s = torch.cuda.Event\(enable_timing=True\)
        e = torch.cuda.Event\(enable_timing=True\)
        s.record\(\)
        for _ in range\(ITERS\):
            run_fn\(\)
        e.record\(\)
        torch.cuda.synchronize\(\)
        times.append\(s.elapsed_time\(e\) * 1000 / ITERS\)
